query:
SELECT n.narrator_id AS "narrator_id!: i64",
                  n.name AS "name!: String",
                  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_narrator WHERE narrator_id = n.narrator_id)
                      AS "book_count!: i64"
             FROM narrators n
            WHERE n.name LIKE ?1 COLLATE NOCASE
            ORDER BY n.name COLLATE NOCASE
            LIMIT ?2 OFFSET ?3
